reviews.review_description:
I specialize in embedded anagrams. I couldn't help but notice:

the V@NG mIke gAllery = V@NGiA = v@gina

Good one! I'm sure this app is very enjoyable. The price is right.
This app is a gift of joy to the world.

Also the mike vANG GalLEry = ANGLE = angel, as in The Angel Michael.

reviews.review_title: Short, enjoyable art exhibit in VR
reviews.review_description:
I love exploring art and museum apps in VR, and this one is a real find. It showcases a curated selection of 13 or 14 pieces by the Portuguese artist known as "The Vang Mike." The artwork is displayed in a cozy gallery setting, accompanied by music chosen by the artist. A short video provides some background on the artist, adding depth to the experience.

If you're an art enthusiast (and you should be), I highly recommend giving this app a try. While art is subjective, we can all appreciate the passion and dedication that went into creating these works, and it's abundantly evident here. I enjoyed the vibrant, modern pieces—one painting even included longitude and latitude coordinates that I captured within VR. When I entered them into the Quest browser, it led me to a stunning street view of... well, I'll let you discover that for yourself!
